However, I think you are referring to the plant "Cannabis", which is actually a plant with the scientific name Cannabiscorus is not found however, I found a plant called "Cannabis" which is also known as the Cannabis plant or the Hemp plant, is a plant with numerous health benefits. The plant is used to treat various health conditions including anxiety, insomnia, and chronic pain due to its sedative and analgesic properties. The bioactive constituents of Cannabis include cannabidiol (CBD), cannabigerol (CBG), and tetrahydrocannabinol (THC), which are responsible for its medicinal effects. The most common herbal preparations made with Cannabis include tinctures, oils, and edibles, which are used to treat various health conditions and provide relief from pain and inflammation.
